subject: fix(mobile): touch targets, safe area insets, grid overflow, active states
body:
Mobile UX fixes identified during user/design perspective review:

- Touch targets: Icon buttons increased from 36px to 44px (2.75rem),
  card links get padding for 44px+ tap area, doc tabs and action
  buttons get min-height: 2.75rem — all meet Apple HIG 44px minimum
- Safe area insets: Added viewport-fit=cover to both pages and
  env(safe-area-inset-*) to body, nav, and footer — prevents content
  overlap with iPhone notch/Dynamic Island
- Grid overflow: Lowered card-grid minmax from 300px to 280px and
  card-grid-sm from 260px to 250px — prevents 2-column overflow on
  576-640px screens where Pico's container leaves ~560px available
- Active states: Added :active opacity to icon buttons, card links,
  article cards, and doc action buttons — provides touch feedback
  since :hover doesn't fire on mobile
- Dynamic meta description: project.html now sets <meta description>
  from meta.json after load — improves SEO when sharing project links

Tags: mobile, ux, touch, accessibility, seo
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: portfolio-site
Semver: patch
